en: Now, come on. Trust me on this. Beautiful.
It's American music the whole way, and I don't want to hear a word.
ko: 미국 음악만 계속 나오고, 한 마디도 듣고 싶지 않아.

en: All right, thank you, sir. You're not seated tonight. Good news. They rescheduled my massage for the morning.
ko: 고마워. 그러니까 오늘 밤은 안 보겠네.

en: Bad news. It's a dude. Don't blame me. It's your mom's fault.
ko: 나를 탓하지 마, 네 엄마 잘못이야.

en: Do you know how many people died in these planes? John Denver, Patsy Cline, Richie Valens.
ko: 여기서 얼마나 많은 사람들이 죽었는지 알아? 존 덴버, 패치 클라인, 리치 발렌스?

en: I've heard you sing. I think you're safe. All right, look, the welcome dinner starts in four hours.
It's a five-hour drive. No bathroom breaks. Uh-oh.
Yeah, I think you're gonna want to hold on to that cup. Damn it!
ko: 와, 그 컵을 꼭 잡고 있어야 할 것 같아.

en: What was that? A giant pothole. The dash is lighting up like a Christmas tree.
Tire's blown. This never would have happened if we were in the air.
ko: 공중에 있었다면 이런 일은 절대 일어나지 않았을 거야.

en: If this had happened in the air, we wouldn't be in the air. We'd be in rock-and-roll heaven.
ko: 그곳에서 일어날 일이면 록앤롤 천국에 있을 거야.
